revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-5-165

Alternative term: Equal-Interval Light

A rhythmic light for which the alternations of light and darkness are of equal duration.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig41.jpg|400px|border]]


Reference: C.I.E.
